heading: Excessive claims with respect to the use of certain fuels
label: 6675 Excessive claims with respect to the use of certain fuels

children.text: Two times the excessive amount; or
the amount claimed under section 6416(a)(4), 6420, 6421, 6427, or 6435, as the case may be, for any period, exceeds
the amount allowable under such section for such period.

children.heading: Assessment and collection of penalty
children.label: c Assessment and collection of penalty
children.text: For assessment and collection of penalty provided by subsection (a), see section 6206.
